case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS VS. AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC, INC., A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC, INC., A CORPORATION DBA AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC AKA TED & AL'S SERVICE CENTER, AKA TED AND AL'S TOWING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC, INC., A CORPORATION DBA AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC AKA TED & AL'S SERVICE CENTER, AKA TED AND AL'S TOWING $803,223.62 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $803,223.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
